base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of special_zone — a tile from 1991 sonic the hedgehog. Special Zone — Chaos Emerald bonus stage (MS version). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Special Zone — Chaos Emerald bonus stage (MS version)
